title: Minecraft HD(64x) Connected Textures Add-On
description: This is an add-on for the Minecraft HD(64x) resource pack, that gives connected textures for glass and other blocks.
body:
This is an add-on for the Minecraft HD(64x) resource pack, that gives connected textures for glass and other blocks.

REQUIRES either Optifine or Fabric & Continuity to work correctly.
